g.title: acq.lineitem_detail:lineitem->acq.lineitem:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (lineitem) REFERENCES acq.lineitem(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.lineitem_detail:fund->acq.fund:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (fund) REFERENCES acq.fund(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.lineitem_detail:fund_debit->acq.fund_debit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (fund_debit) REFERENCES acq.fund_debit(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.lineitem_detail:circ_modifier->config.circ_modifier:code
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (circ_modifier) REFERENCES config.circ_modifier(code) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.lineitem_detail:owning_lib->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (owning_lib) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.lineitem_detail:location->asset.copy_location:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (location) REFERENCES asset.copy_location(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.lineitem_detail:receiver->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (receiver) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.lineitem_detail:cancel_reason->acq.cancel_reason:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (cancel_reason) REFERENCES acq.cancel_reason(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.claim:lineitem_detail->acq.lineitem_detail:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (lineitem_detail) REFERENCES acq.lineitem_detail(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
